name: skeledirge
flavor_texts: The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge’s head gained a soul.
Skeledirge’s gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit.
text: Skeledirge is the Singer Pokémon. It is a fire and ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: blaze, unaware (hidden). Base stats — HP: 104, Attack: 75, Defense: 100, Sp. Atk: 110, Sp. Def: 75, Speed: 66. Evolution line: fuecoco → crocalor → skeledirge. Lore: The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge’s head gained a soul. Skeledirge’s gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit.
